LAW AND MOTION, 302, DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTELS & RESTAURANTS GROUP, LLC'S MOTION TO STAY THE ACTION WHILE ARBITRATION IS PENDING IS GRANTED. IN LIGHT OF THE COURT'S GRANTING OF KIMPTON'S MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, PER CODE OF CIVIL PROCEDURE 1281 THE ACTION IS STAYED WHILE ARBITRATION IS PENDING. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-07-2017 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-12-2016 Continued To Jul-27-16 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Kimpton Hotels And Restaurants Group, Llcs Notice Of Petition And Petition To Compel Arbitration
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michelle Lee of Rudy Exelrod telephone number 415-814-6551 for Plaintiff.
Peter Maretz of Stokes Wagner telephone number 619-237-0909 for Defendant.

The matter was argued. Upon coclusion of argument, the Court confirmed its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTELS & RESTAURANTS GROUP, LLC'S Petition To Compel Arbitration is granted. Pagan has not shown that the arbitration agreement is substantively unconscionable. Nor does the arbitration agreement conflict with the offer letter. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR #12913. (302/HK)

Defendant Kimpton Hotels And Restaurants Group, Llcs Notice Of Motion And Motion To Stay The Action While Arbitration Is Pending
Off Calendar Dec-16-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Michelle Lee of Rudy Exelrod telephone number 415-814-6551 for Plaintiff.
Peter Maretz of Stokes Wagner telephone number 619-237-0909 for Defendant.

DEFENDANT KIMPTON HOTELS & RESTAURANTS GROUP, LLC'S Motion To Stay The Action While Arbitration Is Pending is granted. In light of the court's granting of Kimpton's motion to compel arbitration, per Code of Civil Procedure 1281 the action is stayed while arbitration is pending. Order signed in open Court.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Irene L. Tofft, CSR #12913. (302/HK
